title: Instagram connect
excerpt:
hi i would like instagram to connect with my monday account. 
publish a post direct from monday 
the same with facebook 
how i have to do this? 
regards 
thomas

posts.author: tpaktop (Maxim Filimonov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you have an example of actual Api call you want to make?
As far as I know Instagram doesn’t allow posting via api

posts.author: brands (tom)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi thx

some one told me there is away to post direkt from monday to instagram…

also facebook

posts.author: edan (Edan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m attempting to achieve something similar via Zapier’s webhook.

Not sure if there’s another approach, but this felt like the right route to take.

Still haven’t quite figured out why it’s not working.

Publishing to social media Feature requests
Hi there! I’ve been messing around with ClickUp and Monday to see if I can move over from AirTable. One thing that’s been a struggle is publishing to social media. We plan social media posts every month and via AirTable push relevant fields to a Zapier webhook. What would be the best approach to tackle this with Monday? I’m not interested in using a third part software like Hootsuite. We’ve been down that road a year or two ago and it got too messy having the posts live in a task management s…

posts.author: 0xm3t1 (Flynn .Is)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Finally, there’s a new approach— Publisher, a native app from the monday.com marketplace.
It supports Instagram, Facebook, Threads, and more. Just compose your post template, set up your automation, and you’re good to go—all without leaving monday.com.
Give it a try here

monday.com

Publisher : Social Media - monday.com Marketplace

Schedule & publish multichannel social media post templates.

Hope this helps!
